description_long: This is a single dark-colored dress shoe with a sleek, low-profile silhouette and a rounded toe. The upper appears to be made of textured leather or synthetic material, featuring subtle stitching details and a standard criss-cross lacing system with thin black laces. The shoe has a thin, flat sole with a visible red accent along the heel area, adding a touch of modern style. The interior lining is a lighter shade, possibly gray or blue, and the insole is brown, suggesting a comfortable fit. The shoe shows some minor scuffing at the toe, indicating light use but overall good condition. This type of shoe is typically worn in urban environments for business or casual occasions.
description: A dark, sleek dress shoe with a rounded toe, criss-cross laces, and a red-accented heel. The shoe is lightly used and features a textured upper with subtle stitching.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, criss-cross laces, and subtle texture on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the shoe's low profile, stitching details, and the red accent on the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel area, red accent, and the opening of the shoe with visible interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the shoe's sleek shape, stitching, and red heel accent.
